tasks.label: gradle-compile-java
tasks.command: ./gradlew compileJava && mkdir -p bin/main && cp -r build/classes/java/main/. bin/main/ && cp -r build/resources/main/. bin/main/ 2>/dev/null; true
tasks.detail: Run Gradle compilation with annotation processing, then sync to IDE build output (bin/main/)

tasks.label: run-smoke-tests
tasks.detail: Build, start app, run Karate smoke tests, and collect all logs into a single timestamped file
